articles.title: Before and after: Interior designer revamps her Brookline Victorian
articles.description:
Instead of moving, Cecilia Casagrande tweaked the look and feel of her home. Here’s how she did it.

The post Before and after: Interior designer revamps her Brookline Victorian appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cecilia Casagrande renovated her Brookline Victorian instead of relocating, enhancing local property aesthetics.
The interior design changes reflect a growing trend among Boston homeowners to invest in renovations.
This project may inspire other Brookline residents to improve their homes, boosting local real estate values.
